Claude Managed Agents：让智能体部署速度提升 10 倍

Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster

2026-04-09

Anthropic 推出 Claude Managed Agents，一套用于大规模构建和部署云托管智能体的可组合 API。

主要特点包括：

  • 可组合的 API 设计，灵活构建智能体工作流
  • 云托管基础设施，无需管理底层资源
  • 支持大规模部署，满足企业级需求
  • 显著缩短从开发到生产的时间

这是 Anthropic 在智能体基础设施领域的重要进展，旨在让开发者更快地将智能体应用投入生产环境。

阅读完整文章：https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents

Anthropic introduces Claude Managed Agents, a suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale.

Key features include:

  • Composable API design for flexible agent workflow construction
  • Cloud-hosted infrastructure without managing underlying resources
  • Large-scale deployment support for enterprise needs
  • Significantly reduced time from development to production

This represents Anthropic's important advancement in agent infrastructure, aiming to help developers bring agent applications to production faster.

Read the full article at https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents
